productDisplayName: Timberland Men's Desert Walnut Brown Shoe
description: These chukkas from timberland are great for exploring the great outdoors and other outdoor activities. The sturdy design incorporates premium environmentally friendly materials and wearer friendly features to give you greater comfort and grip. Team this with jeans and shirts for a great casual look.Upper Bionic canvas uppers for greater comfort and durability (Bionic® canvas contains yarns made with a 50% organic cotton outer wrap, 38% recycled PET core and 12% HT polyester to provide increased strength, abrasion resistance and decreased dry time) Lace-ups for a snug Fit Brand logo embossed on the side of heel Midsole Removable anti-fatigue footbed provides all-day comfort and support Full-length EVA anti-fatigue midsole provides lightweight shock absorption and support Outsole Green Rubber& trade outsole made from 42% recycled rubber with woven design for greater grip Wash careUse the appropriate timberland leather shoe polish to keep your shoes cleanDo not use polish over canvas/woven areas
